_comment: Runtime recolor uses R masks only (CloakMasks/…, GPU-baked via CloakMaskBake when missing). cloakColors + avoidColors + radii define that bake (same as before); rebuild Resources/cloakshader.bundle with CloakHueShift + CloakMaskBake (Shaders/README.md).
_comment_avoidRadius: Optional; if omitted, defaults to matchRadius. Same 0.02–1.0 range as matchRadius.
_comment_mapIcon: When true, logs SSMP compass/map-icon sync (without cloak scanner noise unless debugLogging is on).
_comment_scanner: CloakSceneScanner (orphan tk2d sprites only): an orphan matches if tk2dSprite.Collection.name hits any case-insensitive substring in collectionNameContains (OR between entries). Silksong.AssetHelper does not publish a full Hornet player atlas list; use DebugTools.DumpAllAssetNames / bundle asset dumps and grep, or run with debugLogging to log collection= / paths, then add substrings here. No registry or other heuristics. Heuristics below are distilled from adjacent Customizer skin packs (folder name = collection.name, e.g. CuteHornet/Rark Hornet), CustomizerT2DOnly (sactx … Hornet runtime keys), and SSMP PlayerManager (playable hierarchy still uses internal Knight naming). Prefer Knight/ over bare Knight to avoid matching the Knight Hatchling Cln collection. Dropped Tools Cln (tools sheet is main-tint but not cloak-colored).
_comment_scanInterval: FindObjects refresh rate only; orphan tint still applies every LateUpdate to the cache.
_comment_heroMesh: CloakRecolor re-scans the player MeshRenderer list every N frames; material re-apply is still every LateUpdate.
_comment_dumpTex: When true, first use of each mask writes the game's mainTexture beside it as <mask-stem>-original.png (skipped if that file already exists).
